value.found_quote: On **Linux and WSL2**, install `bubblewrap` with your package manager first:
value.rationale: The page describes Codex's sandboxing requiring bubblewrap on Linux and WSL2, explicitly instructing users to install it and noting Codex uses the bwrap executable. This substantiates the claim that OpenAI (Codex) supports/uses bubblewrap on Linux/WSL2, presented as current functionality.
